# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities to **awbuilds.support@gmail.com**.

Do not file a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

You should receive a response within 48 hours. If not, please follow up.

## Scope

- Google Drive OAuth client credentials
- API keys or secrets in committed code
- Authentication token leaks

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.1.x   | ✅        |
